label: Modern / Minimalist
guidance: A modern, minimalist garden: clean geometric lines, concrete, steel and smooth stone, restrained architectural planting (ornamental grasses, clipped hedges, a few sculptural specimens), a limited green-and-neutral palette, and generous open negative space.

label: Japanese Zen
guidance: A calm Japanese zen garden: raked fine gravel, carefully placed rocks and stepping stones, moss, a simple water basin, acers and bamboo, muted greens, and lots of tranquil negative space.

label: English Cottage
guidance: A romantic English cottage garden: dense informal mixed borders overflowing with roses, foxgloves, delphiniums and perennials, soft pastel and rich blooms, brick or stone paths, and a charming, abundant, lived-in feel.

label: Mediterranean
guidance: A warm Mediterranean garden: terracotta pots, gravel and stone, olive trees, lavender, rosemary and citrus, drought-tolerant planting, sun-baked earthy tones, and relaxed rustic charm.

label: Tropical
guidance: A lush tropical garden: large-leaf foliage, palms, banana plants, ferns and bird-of-paradise, dense layered greenery, bold vivid greens, and an immersive jungle canopy feel.

label: Desert / Xeriscape
guidance: A desert xeriscape garden: succulents, agaves and sculptural cacti, gravel and decomposed granite ground, weathered boulders, drought-tolerant architectural planting, and warm arid tones.

label: Rustic Farmhouse
guidance: A rustic farmhouse garden: raised timber vegetable beds, herbs and edibles, wildflowers, weathered wood and galvanised planters, informal productive charm, and a cosy country feel.

label: Coastal
guidance: A breezy coastal garden: ornamental grasses, sea holly and hardy salt-tolerant planting, driftwood, pebbles and sand-toned gravel, weathered timber, and a light airy seaside palette.

label: Bohemian
guidance: An eclectic bohemian garden: layered mismatched pots and planters, macrame and textiles, string lights and lanterns, colourful cushions, trailing plants, and a warm cosy free-spirited vibe.

label: Woodland / Natural
guidance: A naturalistic woodland garden: native shade planting, ferns, hostas and foxgloves, dappled light, bark and stone informal paths, mossy logs, and a wild, effortless natural feel.
